title: matricaria indica
intro: Matricaria indica, also known as the Indian pennywort or false pennywort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-anxiety effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Matricaria indica include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential in treating gastrointestinal disorders and skin issues. Matricaria indica can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
